name: spec-tests-first
description: Spec-Driven Development cycle for Claude Code (v2.2): /sdd:init → spec → build → review → fix → validate → ship. New /sdd:init pre-cycle skill auto-detects three cases (fresh repo / existing codebase / migrate flat specs) so STF can be adopted on existing projects, not just greenfield. Plus everything from v2.1 — per-AC red-green-refactor, in-cycle code-review + fix phases, per-phase status tracking, user-approval gate, scope check, stack-aware test-layout profiles with monorepo support. Zero external plugin dependencies.
